---
title: "Welcome!"
---

On this website you find course materials for the course ELE804/ELE2010 - Industrial Robotics and PLCs at HVL.

Note that some of the PLC related materials are to be found on Canvas, and not on this website.

The interactive robot below is a playful first look at kinematics: move any joint, watch the arm reconfigure, and see how the end-effector pose changes in real time.

```{=html}
<div class="robot-hero">
    <div class="robot-hero__intro">
        <p class="robot-kicker">Interactive Preview</p>
        <h2 class="robot-hero__title">Explore a 6-DOF robot in your browser</h2>
        <p class="robot-hero__lede">This demo runs entirely on the client side, so the plot keeps its sliders, 3D camera, and live pose readout after a normal Quarto render and when the site is published to GitHub Pages.</p>
        <div class="robot-preset-group" aria-label="Preset robot poses">
            <button class="robot-preset" data-preset="home" type="button">Home</button>
            <button class="robot-preset" data-preset="reach" type="button">Reach</button>
            <button class="robot-preset" data-preset="inspect" type="button">Inspect</button>
            <button class="robot-preset" data-preset="wave" type="button">Wave</button>
            <button class="robot-preset" data-preset="random" type="button">Random</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="robot-kinematics-widget" class="robot-widget">
        <div class="robot-plot-frame">
            <div id="robot-plot" class="robot-plot" role="img" aria-label="Interactive 3D model of a six degree of freedom robot arm"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="robot-panel">
            <div class="robot-readouts">
                <section class="robot-readout-card" aria-labelledby="robot-joint-heading">
                    <h3 id="robot-joint-heading">Joint angles</h3>
                    <dl id="robot-joint-readout" class="robot-readout-list"></dl>
                </section>

                <section class="robot-readout-card" aria-labelledby="robot-pose-heading">
                    <h3 id="robot-pose-heading">End-effector pose</h3>
                    <dl id="robot-pose-readout" class="robot-readout-list"></dl>
                </section>
            </div>

            <div id="robot-sliders" class="robot-sliders" aria-label="Joint angle controls"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <noscript>
        <p class="robot-noscript">JavaScript is required to use the interactive robot preview.</p>
    </noscript>
</div>

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>
<script src="assets/robot-eye-catcher.js"></script>
```
